query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A grayscale photograph of a wide, open field with light-colored ground. A curved unpaved road runs along the right foreground. A line of leafless trees spans the horizon with low hills visible behind them, all beneath a heavily clouded sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy black and white photograph of an expansive winter field with light-colored ground, featuring a curved road in the right foreground and a line of bare trees spanning the horizon beneath a heavy, overcast sky. Visible film-like grain textures the entire image, while the bleak, empty landscape and oppressive cloud cover evoke a melancholic atmosphere of isolation and dread.
